# ChartScope

> ChartScope is an AI-powered crypto education app for beginners. On-device ML, chart explanations in 9 languages, privacy-first design. Educational content only — not financial advice.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://chartscope.net/): ChartScope homepage
- [Blog](https://chartscope.net/blog.html): indexable educational articles
- [About](https://chartscope.net/about.html): mission and team
- [Author](https://chartscope.net/author.html): Nicolas Wolf, crypto educator
- [Support](https://chartscope.net/support.html): help and contact
- [Privacy](https://chartscope.net/privacy.html): privacy policy
